title: Mace (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mace''' was a common given name, held by, among others:

*[[Mace Windu]], [[Jedi Master]]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], the Legends version of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*[[Mace Towani]], a youth
*[[Mace (Sith apprentice)|Mace]], a [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]]
*[[Macemillian-winduarté]], a [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] also called Mace

Other uses included:
*the [[mace fly]]
*the [[Mace (weapon)/Legends|mace]], a weapon
*the [[vibro mace]]

{{Disambig}}
